assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md preserves the existing Security Configuration section with Product Lifecycle, Version Streams, and Source Repositories unchanged
assertion_results.evidence: diff between the original input (evals/setup/files/claude-md-configured-with-security.md) and outputs/claude-md-result.md shows zero differences. The Security Configuration section (lines 51-72) is preserved exactly, including: ### Product Lifecycle with all 5 fields (Product pages URL, Jira version prefix, Vulnerability issue type ID, Component label pattern, VEX Justification custom field), ### Version Streams table with the 2.1.x stream entry, and ### Source Repositories table with backend and frontend-ui entries.

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md reports that Security Configuration is already fully configured or up to date
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md Step 10 states: 'The `## Security Configuration` section exists with all subsections fully populated' and concludes with 'Result: Security Configuration is up to date.' The summary also states: 'All sections of the Project Configuration are already configured and up to date. No changes are needed.'

assertion_results.text: outputs/changes-log.md indicates Security Configuration was preserved with no changes needed
assertion_results.evidence: changes-log.md states 'No changes were made. All Project Configuration sections are already fully configured and up to date.' The section-by-section table shows Security Configuration as 'Already configured' with action 'Preserved -- no modifications'. Same for Product Lifecycle, Version Streams, and Source Repositories subsections. The 'Files Modified' section says 'None.'

assertion_results.text: The skill does NOT offer the Security Configuration opt-in prompt — it detects the section already exists and is fully populated (idempotency skip)
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md Step 10 directly detects the existing Security Configuration: 'The `## Security Configuration` section exists with all subsections fully populated' with all fields and no placeholders. It concludes 'Result: Security Configuration is up to date.' No opt-in prompt is mentioned anywhere in the discovery-log.md or changes-log.md. The changes-log.md confirms the section was 'Preserved -- no modifications' indicating the skill skipped the opt-in flow entirely.
